title: School Admin — User Management
content:
Overview


The User Management section is where school admins handle all users within their school. It has three tabs: Students, Parents, and Applications. Each tab has its own search, filters, and bulk actions.



Students Tab


The Students tab shows all active students enrolled at the school. Key features:


  • Search: Filter by name or email using the search bar at the top
  • Sort: Click column headers (Name, Email) to sort the table
  • Bulk select: Use the checkbox at the top-left to select all visible students, or check individual boxes. A bulk actions bar appears with the option to remove selected students
  • Pagination: Navigate through large student lists using the page buttons at the bottom
  • Edit: Click the edit icon on any student row to modify their name, grade level, and parent/guardian information

Adding a Student:


  1. Click the Add Student button
  2. Fill in the student's full name and email address
  3. Select their grade level from the dropdown (Kindergarten through Grade 12, Year 1–5+, or Other)
  4. Set a temporary password or leave blank for auto-generation
  5. Click Add User

The student will receive an email with their login credentials. They log in through the School Login page using their email, password, and the school ID (auto-detected if their email domain matches).


Editing a Student:


  1. Click the edit icon on the student's row
  2. Update name, grade level, or parent/guardian details
  3. Parents can be added or removed — each student can have up to two linked parents/guardians with name and email
  4. Click Save Changes

Removing Students:


Individual students can be removed via the edit modal. For bulk removal, select multiple students using checkboxes, then click Remove Selected in the bulk actions bar. This action cannot be undone — confirm carefully.



Parents Tab


The Parents tab lists all parents/guardians linked to students at the school. Key features:


  • Search: Filter by parent name or email
  • Access filter: Toggle between All Parents, Portal Access (parents who can log in), and No Access (parents not yet granted portal access)
  • Linked Children: Shows which students each parent is connected to
  • Actions: Edit parent details or manage their portal access

Parents gain portal access when the admin approves their application (see Applications tab) or when they are manually linked to a student via the Edit Student modal.



Applications Tab


When a parent submits an application through the "Applying to a School for Your Child?" link on the School Login page, it appears here. Key features:


  • Search: Filter by parent or student name
  • Status filter: View Pending, Approved, or Rejected applications
  • Badge counter: The Applications tab shows a red badge with the number of pending applications

Processing an Application:


  1. Click the Applications tab — a red badge shows pending count
  2. Review the application details: parent name, student name, grade, and submission date
  3. Click Approve to grant the parent portal access and link them to the student, or Reject to deny the application
  4. Approved parents appear in the Parents tab with Portal Access status


Key Talking Points for Agents


  • "You can add students one at a time or in bulk. The Add Student button is at the top of the Students tab."
  • "Parents need to submit an application first, or you can link them manually when editing a student."
  • "The grade level dropdown includes K–12, university years, and an 'Other' option for non-standard levels."
  • "Bulk removal is permanent — make sure you've selected the right students before confirming."
  • "If a parent says they applied but you don't see it, check the Applications tab and make sure the status filter isn't hiding it."
